column1: # Synthetic lmbench fixture for testing --format lmbench parsing/visualization.
# Numbers are illustrative, not real measurements. The "knee" at 1800-2100 MHz
# (bandwidth reaching 95% of peak) is steeper than typical real systems where
# mem-bound workloads plateau much earlier (memfreq_bench stride typically hits
# 95% of peak at ~30% of max freq). Use lmbench_freq_sweep.sh for real data.
